name: sp3-browser
description: SP3 Browser – der anpassbarste Datenschutz-Browser der Welt. Privacy First. Security First. User Control First. Performance First.
author: SP3 Project

scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run icon && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run icon && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run icon && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.dist:ubuntu: npm run build && npm run icon && electron-builder --linux dir --publish never && node scripts/make-deb.mjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run icon && electron-builder --mac --publish never
